channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Portugal vs Croatia World Cup 2026 Round of 32 Live Updates: Goalless Battle in Early Stages
item.description: Portugal and Croatia faced each other in a highly anticipated Round of 32 clash of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Toronto, marking their first-ever meeting in a World Cup knockout stage. The match drew gl...

item.title: U.S. ambassador disputes claim Canada is funding Gordie Howe International Bridge, citing toll-based repayment model
item.description: U.S. Ambassador to Canada Pete Hoekstra has rejected the idea that Canada is directly paying for the Gordie Howe International Bridge, calling it a “big myth” during an interview on a Canada-U.S. trad...

item.title: US pulls out most counterterrorism troops from Nigeria’s Lake Chad Basin after joint operations

item.title: England’s World Cup victory over DR Congo attracts 16.3 million UK TV viewers

item.title: Economists respond to weaker-than-expected U.S. June jobs report showing 57,000 new jobs
